<!-- NEWS.md is maintained by https://cynkra.github.io/fledge, do not edit -->

- Major overhaul of dependency management and environment specification; see `Environment Set Up` Vignette
- Updated `renv/settings.json` to enable lockfile sanitization and changed snapshot type to implicit.
- Added new tests for functions related to bounding box retrieval and land cover data downloading in `tests/testthat/test-get_bounding_box_for_iso_code.R`.
- Created a new vignette `downloading-land-cover-with-geodata.Rmd` to document the usage of the `geodata` package for downloading land cover data.
- Modified `pipeline-definition.Rmd` to clarify the handling of geospatial data and added parameters for the `geodata` package.
- Create renv settings file for package dependency management.
- Add pipeline framework with initial tests for build_local_pipeline and link_inputs functions.
- Introduce vignettes for linking input data and pipeline definition, detailing usage and configuration.


- Create renv settings file for package dependency management.

- Introduce vignettes for linking input data and pipeline definition, detailing usage and configuration.
